name: World RP (Selkie)
description:
Hello! I'm not a big bot-maker, so I won't post often :)
This is a world where humans and selkies Co-Exist! Though selkies don't show themselves as such often. This is a bot primarily meant for RPing and generally enjoying yourself! All information on the world and it's lore is in Bot's Info. This bot was inspired after the world created by atlas_hound on Instagram. They're also the creator of the bot's image! Go check them out, they're amazing!
I hope you enjoy!
creator: Justalilindielovinguy
